title: Tyndale University College & Seminary - Canada.ca
content:
## Tyndale University College & Seminary
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Education
- Bachelor of Arts, Bachelor of Arts (Honours) in humanities, social sciences or business studies
- Bachelor of Biblical Studies
- Master of Divinity, honorary Doctor of Divinity
- Doctor of Missiology
- Bachelor of Religious Education, Master of Religious Education
- Bachelor of Religious Studies
- Bachelor of Sacred Music
- Bachelor of Theology, Master of Theology, Doctor of Theology
- Master of Theological Studies
- Bachelor in Business Administration – BBA
- Master of Arts in Clinical Counselling – MA in Clinical Counselling
- Master of Arts in Thanatology – MA in Thanatology
- Master of Arts in Children, Youth and Adult Discipleship – MA in Children, Youth and Adult Discipleship
- Master of Arts in Historical and Theological Studies – MA in Historical and Theological Studies
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
